66:10.en: Allah presents an example of those who disbelieved: the wife of Noah and the wife of Lot. They were under two of Our righteous servants but betrayed them, so those prophets did not avail them from Allah at all, and it was said, "Enter the Fire with those who enter."
66:10.fr: Allah a cité en parabole pour ceux qui ont mécru la femme de Noé et la femme de Lot. Elles étaient sous l'autorité de deux vertueux de Nos serviteurs. Toutes deux les trahirent et ils ne furent d'aucune aide pour [ces deux femmes] vis-à-vis d'Allah. Et il [leur] fut dit: «Entrez au Feu toutes les deux, avec ceux qui y entrent»,

68:17.ar: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
68:17.en: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning
68:17.fr: Nous les avons éprouvés comme Nous avons éprouvé les propriétaires du verger qui avaient juré d'en faire la récolte au matin,

69:19.ar: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
69:19.en: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
69:19.fr: Quant à celui à qui on aura remis le Livre en sa main droite, il dira: «Tenez! lisez mon livre.

71:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
71:1.en: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."
71:1.fr: Nous avons envoyé Noé vers son peuple: «Avertis ton peuple, avant que leur vienne un châtiment douloureux».

72:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًۭا
72:1.en: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an.
72:1.fr: Dis: «Il m'a été révélé qu'un groupe de djinns prêtèrent l'oreille, puis dirent: «Nous avons certes entendu une Lecture [le Coran] merveilleuse,

80:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
80:1.en: The Prophet frowned and turned away
80:1.fr: Il s'est renfrogné et il s'est détourné

81:19.en: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
81:19.fr: Ceci [le Coran] est la parole d'un noble Messager,

84:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ

84:7.en: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
84:7.fr: Celui qui recevra son livre en sa main droite,

87:16.en: But you prefer the worldly life,
87:16.fr: Mais, vous préférez plutôt la vie présente,

87:18.en: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
87:18.fr: Ceci se trouve, certes, dans les Feuilles anciennes,

93:4.en: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
93:4.fr: La vie dernière t'est, certes, meilleure que la vie présente.

93:9.en: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
93:9.fr: Quant à l'orphelin, donc, ne le maltraite pas.

94:5.en: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
94:5.fr: A côté de la difficulté est, certes, une facilité!

96:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
96:1.en: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
96:1.fr: Lis, au nom de ton Seigneur qui a créé,

97:1.ar: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
97:1.en: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
97:1.fr: Nous l'avons certes, fait descendre (le Coran) pendant la nuit d'Al-Qadr.

98:5.ar: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
98:5.en: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.
98:5.fr: Il ne leur a été commandé, cependant, que d'adorer Allah, Lui vouant un culte exclusif, d'accomplir la Salât et d'acquitter la Zakât. Et voilà la religion de droiture.

99:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
99:1.en: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
99:1.fr: Quand la terre tremblera d'un violent tremblement,

101:6.en: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
101:6.fr: quant à celui dont la balance sera lourde

105:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
105:1.en: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
105:1.fr: N'as-tu pas vu comment ton Seigneur a agi envers les gens de l'Eléphant?

110:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
110:1.en: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
110:1.fr: Lorsque vient le secours d'Allah ainsi que la victoire,

112:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ

113:1.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
113:1.en: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
113:1.fr: Dis: «Je cherche protection auprès du Seigneur de l'aube naissante,
